stdout:
Table	Create Table
passport_info	CREATE TABLE `passport_info` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `passportNumber` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `issuingCountry` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `nationality` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `fullName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `birthDate` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `gender` enum('M','F') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `issueDate` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `expiryDate` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `passportImageUrl` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `passportImageKey` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ocrData` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `isVerified` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `passport_info_userId_unique` (`userId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
